name: Coach King Giantrainer
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>熱</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ねっ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>血</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>けつ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>指</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>導</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>どう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>王</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>おう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ジャイアントレーナー
desc:
3 Level 8 monsters
You can detach 1 material from this card; draw 1 card and reveal it, then if it was a monster, inflict 800 damage to your opponent. You cannot conduct your Battle Phase the turn you activate this effect. You can only use this effect of "Coach King Giantrainer" up to thrice per turn.
